svg.text: All bolt-placement options — same truss, 5 rules
Frame TN2-1 from your 2603191 ROCKVILLE truss. Compare bolt count and pattern, pick the rule you want.
10 members · 22 raw centreline crossings · blue = chord plate, grey = web stud
3 bolts clustered near each junction, offset from crossing
Reading the diagrams: blue hatched bands = chord plates · grey hatched bands = web studs · dashed lines = centrelines · circles = bolt holes · ×N labels show how many crossings merged into one bolt.
